ddls:
CREATE TABLE "senators" (
  "senator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each senator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the senator */,
  "picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the senator's picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the senator's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the senator's record was last updated */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the senator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for official communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for official communication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Official address of the senator */,
  "born_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the senator */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the senator */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education achieved by the senator */,
  "constituency" TEXT /* The constituency the senator represents */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the senator is currently active in politics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("senator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the political party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation or short name of the party */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the party was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the party's logo */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current leader of the party */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for official communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for official communication */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the party's official website */,
  "headquarters_address" TEXT /* Address of the party's headquarters */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the party is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parties_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES senators ("senator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "senator_parties" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party affiliation */,
  "senator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the senator associated with the affiliation */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political party */,
  "affiliation_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the affiliation */,
  "affiliation_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the affiliation */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the affiliation is current */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the party affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_senator_parties_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_senator_parties_senator_id FOREIGN KEY ("senator_id") REFERENCES senators ("senator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Chairperson, Convener) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the role is currently active */,
  "is_leadership_role" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the role is a leadership role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the senator who is the chairperson of the committee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the committee was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the committee was last updated */,
  "parent_committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent committee (if applicable) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the committee is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committees_parent_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committees_chairperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("chairperson_id") REFERENCES senators ("senator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_members" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee membership */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee */,
  "senator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the senator */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the senator holds in the committee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the membership */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the membership */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the membership is current */,
  "is_leadership_role" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the role is a leadership role */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the committee membership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_members_senator_id FOREIGN KEY ("senator_id") REFERENCES senators ("senator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_members_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_members_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, public) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_until" TEXT /* Timestamp until which the user account is locked out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the user session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "request_url" TEXT /* URL of the request made by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "senator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the senator */,
  "tenure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenure */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification is to be sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "is_sent" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., scheduled, sent, failed) */,
  "retry_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the notification has been retried */,
  "last_retry_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last retry attempt */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_senator_id FOREIGN KEY ("senator_id") REFERENCES senators ("senator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
